# iCorner - Your Online Corner, Where Your Web Begins

Your Personal Corner for Homepage & Bookmarks.
Personal Space, Cloud Sync, Connect & Explore.

iCorner Features:

- Cloud Sync
  - Set once, sync everywhere: Bookmarks, settings, and preferences are saved to the cloud in real-time
  - Access your data from any browser, anytime, anywhere
  - Break free from single-browser limitations – your data moves with you
- Flexible Customization
  - Five display modes: Icon, Card, List, Tile, and Image – switch seamlessly as you prefer
  - Freely adjust display size for optimal viewing comfort
  - Flexible control over rendering effects to create your personalized view
  - Powerful directory management to keep your sites perfectly organized
- Personal Collections
  - Create your exclusive collection space for quick access to important sites
  - Right-click quick actions: Add, edit, delete – simple and efficient
  - One-click import of browser bookmarks for a seamless and effortless transition
  - Automatic website icon sync for vivid, visual bookmarking
  - Drag-and-drop sorting to keep frequently used content within easy reach
- Trending Discoveries
  - Popular sites across the web to stay on trend
  - Explore undiscovered quality websites and broaden your browsing horizons
  - Smart categorization and filtering for quick access to content you'll love
- Sharing Plaza
  - Share your favorite website discoveries with users worldwide
  - Find interesting sites recommended by others and expand your knowledge
  - Connect with like-minded individuals through community interaction
- Smart Search
  - Freely switch between multiple search engines to meet different needs
  - Auto-complete functionality (supports Google/Bing/Yahoo/Baidu) for enhanced search efficiency
- Multi Workspaces
  - Effortlessly switch between multiple identities for different scenarios
  - Share content with the global community
  - Completely independent settings make each space uniquely yours
- Visual Themes
  - Curated selection of beautiful backgrounds to change as you please
  - Support for custom background uploads to express your unique style
  - Free color scheme customization to create your perfect visual space
  - Light/Dark mode, switch freely
- Multi-Language Support
  - Full support for English and Chinese interfaces
  - More languages continuously being added – we welcome your suggestions
